statements.sql: select * from `Employers` where `Employers`.`user_id` = 2 and `Employers`.`user_id` is not null limit 1
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (1)
select `tags`.*, `job_tag`.`job_id` as `pivot_job_id`, `job_tag`.`tag_id` as `pivot_tag_id` from `tags` inner join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `job_tag`.`job_id` = 25
select `Employers`.`name`, `Employers`.`id` from `Employers` where `user_id` = 2 order by `Employers`.`name` asc limit 50
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` where `tags`.`id` in (1)
select distinct `tags`.* from `tags` left join `job_tag` on `tags`.`id` = `job_tag`.`tag_id` order by `tags`.`name` asc limit 50
